fields.name: message_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this position concentration report message

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: When the message was generated and sent

fields.name: source_department
fields.description: The originating department sending the report

fields.name: destination_department
fields.description: The receiving department for risk and compliance review

fields.name: report_type
fields.description: Classification of the report as a position concentration analysis

fields.name: reporting_date
fields.description: The date as of which the portfolio concentration is measured

fields.name: data
fields.description: Container for all portfolio concentration analysis data

children.name: portfolio_summary
children.description: High-level summary metrics of the entire portfolio

children.name: total_positions
children.description: Total number of individual positions held in the portfolio

children.name: total_market_value
children.description: Aggregate market value of all positions in the portfolio

children.name: currency
children.description: Currency denomination of all monetary values in the report

children.name: concentration_threshold_alert
children.description: Flag indicating whether portfolio concentration exceeds defined thresholds

children.name: concentration_by_sector
children.description: Breakdown of portfolio concentration by industry sector

children.name: sector
children.description: Name of the industry sector

children.name: percentage_of_portfolio
children.description: Sector's share of total portfolio market value as a percentage

children.name: number_of_positions
children.description: Count of individual positions within this sector

children.name: market_value
children.description: Total market value of all positions in this sector

children.name: risk_level
children.description: Qualitative risk assessment for the sector concentration

children.name: concentration_by_single_name
children.description: Breakdown of portfolio concentration by individual security issuer

children.name: issuer_name
children.description: Legal name of the security issuer

children.name: ticker
children.description: Stock exchange ticker symbol for the security

children.name: percentage_of_portfolio
children.description: Issuer's position as a percentage of total portfolio market value

children.name: market_value
children.description: Current market value of all holdings in this issuer

children.name: number_of_shares
children.description: Total quantity of shares held in this issuer

children.name: compliance_status
children.description: Whether the single-name position complies with regulatory concentration limits

children.name: regulatory_limit
children.description: Maximum permitted percentage of portfolio for a single issuer under regulation

children.name: concentration_by_geography
children.description: Breakdown of portfolio concentration by geographic region or country

children.name: country
children.description: Geographic region or country of security issuance or listing

children.name: percentage_of_portfolio
children.description: Region's share of total portfolio market value as a percentage

children.name: market_value
children.description: Total market value of all positions in this geographic region

children.name: number_of_positions
children.description: Count of individual positions in this geographic region

children.name: regulatory_compliance
children.description: Summary of regulatory compliance status and breaches for concentration limits

children.name: single_name_limit_exceeded
children.description: Whether any single issuer position exceeds regulatory concentration limits

children.name: sector_limit_exceeded
children.description: Whether any sector concentration exceeds regulatory limits

children.name: breaching_limits
children.description: List of specific concentration limits that are currently breached

children.name: category
children.description: The concentration category (sector, single-name, or geography) that is breaching limits

children.name: limit
children.description: The regulatory maximum threshold for this concentration category

children.name: current_value
children.description: The current concentration level exceeding the regulatory limit

children.name: action_required
children.description: The remedial action needed to bring the portfolio into compliance

children.name: last_compliance_check
children.description: When the most recent regulatory compliance check was performed

children.name: next_compliance_check
children.description: When the next scheduled regulatory compliance check is due

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Administrative metadata about the report preparation and quality

children.name: prepared_by
children.description: The team or system that prepared the position concentration report

children.name: approval_status
children.description: Current approval workflow status of the report

children.name: data_quality_score
children.description: Quantitative measure of data completeness and accuracy as a percentage
